member.name: T:Sudoku.Drawing.ColorPalette
member.summary: Represents a color palette instance.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas
member.summary: Represents a canvas that allows drawing sudoku-related items onto it.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.RotateAngle
member.summary: Represents a radian value equivalent to 45 degree. This field is used for rotate the chains if overlapped.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.SqrtOf2
member.summary: Represents square root of 2. This field is used for rotate the chains.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas._needFooterText
member.summary: Indicates whether the footer text can be drawn in this canvas, making canvas reserve footer.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas._calculator
member.summary: Indicates the backing point calculator to be used.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas._stringAligner
member.summary: Represents a instance that locates the text drawn, created by method , with centering the text with both horizontal aligning and vertical aligning.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas._backingBitmap
member.summary: Indicates the backing bitmap to be used.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas._g
member.summary: Indicates the backing instance to draw elements.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas._isDisposed
member.summary: Indicates whether the object is disposed.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a instance via some values.
member.param: Indicates the picture size to be used.
Indicates the padding of the inner grid.
Indicates settings that can be used by drawing items.
Indicates whether footer text is enabled to be drawn.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.Settings
member.summary: Indicates canvas settings to be used. The value can be changed if you want to change.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.SavePictureTo(System.String)
member.summary: Try to save the picture into the local path.
member.exception: Throws when the file doesn't contain any valid file extension.
Throws when the specified file extension is not supported.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.TryGetPaletteColorByIndex(System.Int32,System.Drawing.Color@)
member.summary: Try to get the result color value.
member.exception: Throws when the ID is invalid.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.GetColor(Sudoku.Drawing.ColorIdentifier)
member.summary: Gets the color value.
member.exception: Throws when the specified value is invalid.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.MeasureFooterTextExtraHeight(System.String,System.Int32,Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings)
member.summary: Try to get extra height that footer text will use.
member.param: Indicates the size to be used.
Indicates the settings to be used.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.GetFooterTextFont(System.Single,Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings)
member.summary: Get the font via the specified name, size and the scale.
member.param: The size that decides the default font size.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.GetFont(System.String,System.Single,System.Decimal,System.Drawing.FontStyle)
member.summary: Get the font via the specified name, size and the scale.
member.param: The font name that decides the font to use and presentation.
The size that decides the default font size.
The scale that decides the result font size.
The style that decides the font style of the text in the picture.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.CreateGraphics(System.Boolean,System.Int32,Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings,System.Drawing.Bitmap@)
member.summary: Creates a instance via values.
member.param: Indicates whether canvas can draw footer text.
Indicates the bitmap instance that returns after instance is created.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.Clear
member.summary: Clear the canvas, removing all drawn elements.
member.remarks: This will invalidate drawing items, and draw background and border lines.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawBackground
member.summary: Draw the background.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawBorderLines
member.summary: Draw border lines onto the canvas.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawFooterText(System.String)
member.summary: Draw footer text onto the canvas.
member.exception: Throws when the canvas doesn't support drawing footer text.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawGrid``1(``0@)
member.summary: Draw a or instance onto the canvas.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawCellViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.CellViewNode})
member.summary: Draw cell view nodes onto the canvas.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawCandidateViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.CandidateViewNode},System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Concepts.Conclusion})
member.summary: Draw candidate view nodes onto the canvas, with conflict check on conclusions.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawHouseViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.HouseViewNode})
member.summary: Draw house view nodes onto the canvas.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawLinkViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.ILinkViewNode},System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Concepts.Conclusion})
member.summary: Draw link view nodes onto the canvas, with conflict check on conclusions. If any conclusions is lying on the line of the link drawn, the link will be automatically adjusted to a curve.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawChuteViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.ChuteViewNode})
member.summary: Draw chute view nodes onto the canvas.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawBabaGroupingViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.BabaGroupViewNode})
member.summary: Draw baba grouping view nodes onto the canvas.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawEliminations(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Concepts.Conclusion},System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.CandidateViewNode})
member.summary: Draw eliminations onto the canvas, with conflict check on nodes. If a node covers (uses) one candidate, the elimination will be treated as a cannibalism one, drawing with different color.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvas.DrawIconViewNodes(System.ReadOnlySpan{Sudoku.Drawing.Nodes.IconViewNode})
member.summary: Draw icon view nodes onto the canvas.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings
member.summary: Represents with a preference type that stores the configurations on drawing.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ShowCandidates
member.summary: Indicates whether the form shows candidates.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ShowLightHouse
member.summary: Indicates whether the grid painter will use new algorithm to draw a house (lighter).

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BorderBarFullyOverlapsGridLine
member.summary: Indicates whether border bars will fully overlaps the shared grid line while drawing.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ValueScale
member.summary: Indicates the scale of values.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.CandidateScale
member.summary: Indicates the scale of candidates.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.FooterTextScale
member.summary: Indicates the scale that footer text will be drawn. The value unit is unified with and .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.GridLineWidth
member.summary: Indicates the grid line width of the sudoku grid to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BlockLineWidth
member.summary: Indicates the block line width of the sudoku grid to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.FigurePadding
member.summary: Indicates the padding of figures.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.GivenFontName
member.summary: Indicates the font of given digits to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ModifiableFontName
member.summary: Indicates the font of modifiable digits to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.CandidateFontName
member.summary: Indicates the font of candidate digits to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BabaGroupingFontName
member.summary: Indicates the font of baba grouping characters to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.FooterTextFontName
member.summary: Indicates the font of footer text to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.GivenFontStyle
member.summary: Indicates the font style of the givens.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ModifiableFontStyle
member.summary: Indicates the font style of the modifiables.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.CandidateFontStyle
member.summary: Indicates the font style of the candidates.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BabaGroupingCharacterFontStyle
member.summary: Indicates the font style of a baba grouping.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.FooterTextFontStyle
member.summary: Indicates the font style of footer text.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.GivenColor
member.summary: Indicates the given digits to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ModifiableColor
member.summary: Indicates the modifiable digits to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.CandidateColor
member.summary: Indicates the candidate digits to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.NormalColor
member.summary: Indicates the normal color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.AssignmentColor
member.summary: Indicates the color that draws for an assignment.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.OverlappedAssignmentColor
member.summary: Indicates the color that draws for an overlapped assignment.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.EliminationColor
member.summary: Indicates the elimination color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.CannibalismColor
member.summary: Indicates the cannibalism color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ExofinColor
member.summary: Indicates the exo-fin color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.EndofinColor
member.summary: Indicates the endo-fin color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ChainColor
member.summary: Indicates the chain color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Indicates the background color of the sudoku grid to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.GridLineColor
member.summary: Indicates the grid line color of the sudoku grid to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BlockLineColor
member.summary: Indicates the block line color of the sudoku grid to draw.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.BabaGroupingCharacterColor
member.summary: Indicates the color of the baba grouping identifier color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.FooterTextColor
member.summary: Indicates footer text color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.AuxiliaryColorSet
member.summary: Indicates the auxiliary color set.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.AlmostLockedSetColorSet
member.summary: Indicates the almost locked set color set.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.RectangleColorSet
member.summary: Indicates the almost rectangle color set.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.GridCanvasSettings.ColorPalette
member.summary: Indicates the user-defined color palette.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator
member.summary: Provides a serial of methods for a point calculator that interacts with the UI projects.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.AnchorsCount
member.summary: Indicates the number of anchors hold per house.
member.remarks: The sudoku grid painter will draw the outlines and the inner lines, and correct the point of each digits (candidates also included). Each row or column always contains 27 candidates, so this value is 27.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.DefaultPadding
member.summary: Indicates the default padding of the sudoku grid drawn.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a instance via the specified picture size and padding value.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.#ctor(System.Drawing.SizeF,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a instance with the specified picture size instance and padding value.
member.param: Indicates the padding to set to allow the output items moving a little bit left or right, in order to correct the position on drawing. The default value is 10F, which is defined by

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.ControlSize
member.summary: Indicates the control size.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GridSize
member.summary: Indicates the grid size.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.CellSize
member.summary: Indicates the cell size.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.CandidateSize
member.summary: Indicates the candidate size.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GridPoints
member.summary: Indicates the absolutely points in grid cross-lines. This property will be assigned later (and not ).
member.remarks: Note that the size of this 2D array is always 28 by 28.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetCell(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Get the focus cell offset via a mouse point.
member.returns: The cell offset. Returns -1 when the current point is invalid.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetCandidate(System.Drawing.PointF)
member.summary: Get the focus candidate offset via a mouse point.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMouseCenter(Sudoku.Concepts.CandidateMap@)
member.summary: Get the center mouse point of all candidates.
member.exception: Throws when the argument is invalid.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMouseRectangle(Sudoku.Concepts.CandidateMap@)
member.summary: Get the rectangle from all candidates.
member.exception: Throws when the argument is invalid.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMouseRectangleViaCell(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the rectangle (4 mouse points) via the specified cell.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMouseRectangle(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the rectangle (4 mouse points) for the specified cell and digit of a candidate.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMouseRectangleViaHouse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the rectangle (4 mouse points) via the specified house.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetAnchorsViaHouse(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets two points that specifies and represents the anchors of this house.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetSharedLinePosition(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets two points specifies and represents a line as shared border grid lines between two adjacent cells.
member.param: The second cell that is adjacent with by row or column.
member.returns: The two points representing with a line.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMousePointInCenter(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the mouse point of the center of a cell via its offset.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Drawing.PointCalculator.GetMousePointInCenter(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the mouse point of the center of a cell via its offset and the digit.

member.name: T:System.Drawing.BitmapExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods on .

member.name: T:System.Drawing.BitmapExtensions.<>E__0
member.summary: Provides extension members on .

member.name: M:System.Drawing.BitmapExtensions.<>E__0.ZoomTo(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Zoom a picture.
member.returns: The new bitmap instance that has been zoomed.

member.name: T:System.Drawing.ColorExtensions
member.summary: Provides with extension methods on .

member.name: T:System.Drawing.ColorExtensions.<>E__0
member.summary: Provides extension members on .

member.name: P:System.Drawing.ColorExtensions.<>E__0.QuarterAlpha
member.summary: Gets a target whose value is a quarter of the original one.

target.name: method
target.summary: Deconstruct the current instance into multiple values, which means you can use the value-tuple syntax like (a, b, c) to define your own deconstruction logic.

member.name: T:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions
member.summary: Provides with extension methods on .

member.name: T:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0
member.summary: Provides extension members on .

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.DrawValue``1(``0,System.Drawing.Font,System.Drawing.Brush,System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.StringFormat)
member.summary: Draw the string representation of an instance onto the current instance.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to draw.

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.DrawHollowArrow(System.Drawing.Brush,System.Drawing.PointF,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Fills a hollow arrow.
member.exception: Throws when the argument is below 0 or either or is below 0.

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.DrawCrossSign(System.Drawing.Pen,System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Draw a cross sign (x).
member.remarks: This method will draw a cross sign and fill with the specified color, so you don't need to find any fill methods.

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.DrawCapsule(System.Drawing.Pen,System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Draw a capsule.

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.FillCapsule(System.Drawing.Brush,System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Fill a capsule.

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.DrawRoundedRectangle(System.Drawing.Pen,System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Single)
member.summary: Draw a rounded rectangle.
member.exception: Throws when is greater than the value in .

member.name: M:System.Drawing.GraphicsExtensions.<>E__0.FillRoundedRectangle(System.Drawing.Brush,System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Single)
member.summary: Fill a rounded rectangle.
member.exception: Throws when is greater than the value in .

member.summary: Provides extension members on .

member.name: M:System.Drawing.RectangleOrRectangleFExtensions.<>E__0.Zoom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Zoom in or out the rectangle by the specified offset. If the offset is positive, the rectangle will be larger; otherwise, smaller.
member.param: The offset to zoom in or out.

target.name: method
target.summary: Deconstruct the current instance into multiple values, which means you can use the value-tuple syntax like (a, b, c) to define your own deconstruction logic.

member.summary: Provides extension members on .

member.name: M:System.Drawing.RectangleOrRectangleFExtensions.<>E__3.Zoom(System.Single)
member.summary: Zoom in or out the rectangle by the specified offset. If the offset is positive, the rectangle will be larger; otherwise, smaller.
member.param: The offset to zoom in or out.

member.summary: Truncate the specified rectangle.
